name: In My Brain
short_description: In My Brain is a pixel art sci-fi action-puzzle game that follows Nano, a nanoparticle that infiltrates minds and fights against the mental health problems that haunt them. Learn about them and fight them from the inside!
detailed_description:
Fight the problems of the mind from the inside

In My Brain is a pixel art action-puzzle sci-fi game in which you will follow Nano, a nanoparticle that infiltrates the minds of people with mental health problems to help them overcome the challenges they face. To do this, you'll have to solve diverse puzzles, confront all sorts of enemies and collect Nanoballs.

The tools available to Nano to accomplish his mission include melee attacks, which have less range and do less damage, and ranged attacks, which Nano will be able to fire from his suit. But beware, ranged attacks use finite energy, so you'll have to use them wisely.



A new take on mental health

In My Brain, you will find some special collectibles: Nanoballs. These contain important information. Thanks to it, you will be able to learn and understand more about four very common mental illnesses in our society that are often stigmatized: anorexia, schizophrenia, depression and bipolar disorder.

Join Nano as he delves into the human mind, and become aware of the difficulties these mental health problems create from the people who experience them.



Based on real events

In my Brain is inspired by real situations and experiences. That is why through it you will be able to explore, from a fantastic and science fiction world, mental health problems and the challenges they bring in the real world. It is the result of a long process of documentation, including interviews with people suffering from the problems represented in the game, and the approval of a specialist psychiatrist.

supported_languages:
English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Catalan*
*languages with full audio support
